scripts.build: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-commerce-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-templates && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-template-presets && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-commerce && npm run build -w @mdwrk/subscription-store-content-pack && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/subscription-store-demo-t0.test.mjs tests/subscription-store-demo-t1.test.mjs tests/subscription-store-demo-t2.test.mjs tests/vite-delivery-t1.test.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-commerce-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-templates && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-template-presets && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-commerce && npm run build -w @mdwrk/subscription-store-content-pack && tsc --noEmit
